$description.$value: [FIGMA-ONLY] Temporary tokens used only for Figma documentation of the viewport / responsive system. They drive the _pseudo_header component variant so the header swaps with viewport modes. Delete when the real header component ships.

variant.$description: [FIGMA-ONLY] Pseudo / temporary. Selects the _pseudo_header component variant for the md viewport. Mobile header below lg, desktop from lg up. Bind to the header component's variant property; delete when the real header ships.
